followingRules: You're following your trading rules. Keep it up!
tipRevengTrading: Wait at least 15 minutes after a loss before taking another trade. Take a break and return to your plan.
tipOvertrading: Set yourself a maximum number of trades per day (3-5) and respect that limit no matter what.
tipStopNotRespected: Always use a hard stop loss. Never move your stop in the direction of the loss.
tipTradingTilt: After 3 consecutive losses, stop trading for the day. The market will still be there tomorrow.
tipEarlyExit: Let your winners run. Use a trailing stop to lock in profits without cutting too early.
tipWeekendTrading: The forex market is closed on weekends. Monday opening gaps carry additional risks.

landing_heroSub: MarketPhase shows you the metrics that matter — and the behaviors that lead to profit. 35+ pro tools, AI, and advanced analytics.
landing_sec1Desc: Record your trades with emotions, screenshots, tags and notes. Analyze everything with automatically generated advanced statistics.
landing_sec1Card1Desc: Emotions, notes, screenshots, tags for every trade
landing_sec1Card2Desc: Win rate, R:R, profit factor calculated in real time
landing_sec1Card3Desc: Visualize your gains and losses day by day
landing_sec2Desc: Understand your mistakes, identify your strengths. Sortino, Calmar, drawdown, correlation — everything is calculated for you.
landing_sec2Card1Desc: Sharpe, Sortino, Calmar, Profit Factor, drawdown...
landing_sec2Card2Desc: Pearson matrix between your traded assets
landing_sec2Card3Desc: Overall A-F grade with detailed sub-scores
landing_sec3Desc: Pattern detection in YOUR data. Discipline score. Overtrading alerts. Performance decay. Best trading window. Everything is personalized.
landing_sec3Card1Desc: AI finds invisible trends in your trades
landing_sec3Card2Desc: Score out of 100 based on your rules and habits
landing_sec3Card3Desc: Unique advice based on your history
landing_sec4Desc: Live P&L, active market sessions, daily checklist, mood tracker, performance gauges. Like a Bloomberg Terminal, but for you.
landing_sec5Desc: Modify your SL, TP, size, number of trades. See the impact instantly. Compare Actual vs Simulated with an interactive equity curve.
landing_sec6Desc: Active challenges, badges, XP system, levels, leaderboard. Because discipline is key — and gamification makes it fun.
landing_sec6Card4Desc: Chat with other traders in real time
landing_testimonialSub: Traders from around the world use MarketPhase.
landing_pricingSub: No Pro plan. No trial. No credit card. Everything is included.
landing_finalSub: The most complete trading journal on the market is free. There's no reason not to try.
landing_footerDesc: The most complete free trading journal. 35+ tools, AI, market data, gamification.
landing_feat5Desc: Replay your trades with 'What if' analysis
landing_testimonial1Text: I left TradeZella for MarketPhase. More features, free, and the AI Coach helped me gain 15% win rate in 2 months.
landing_testimonial2Text: The War Room is incredible. Live P&L, sessions, checklist. It's my daily trading cockpit. I'll never go back.
landing_testimonial3Text: The challenges and badges keep me disciplined. My profit factor went from 1.2 to 2.1 in 3 months. Thank you MarketPhase.

perfRecDiscipline1: Place a stop-loss on every single trade without exception.
perfRecDiscipline2: Define a trading plan before each session and follow it.
perfRecDiscipline3: Reduce size when on a losing streak to avoid tilt.
perfRecRisk1: Never risk more than 1-2% of your capital per trade.
perfRecRisk2: Monitor your max drawdown — set a daily loss limit.
perfRecRisk3: Diversify your positions to limit concentrated exposure.
perfRecProfit1: Improve your R:R ratio by looking for setups with at least 1:2.
perfRecProfit2: Analyze your losing trades to reduce false signals.
perfRecProfit3: Let your winners run and cut your losers quickly.
perfRecGrowth1: Regularly compare your metrics month over month.
perfRecGrowth2: Document each trade with screenshots and notes.
perfRecGrowth3: Set realistic and measurable monthly goals.
